notes: Added a separate lead-sheet-team runtime with its own run directory root at ./.lead-sheet-ai/runs.
Defined dedicated phase contracts for intake, preprocess, extract, align, verify, review, and publish.
Added role prompts that explicitly bias toward evidence-based extraction and against inference.
Exposed lead-sheet-team lifecycle commands through package.json without changing the existing development AI team command names.
Defined a Markdown-first storage contract where approved output publishes into one file per song under ./lead-sheets before any future Supabase migration.
open_issues: The new runtime currently scaffolds orchestration only; it does not yet include real extraction, alignment, or publishing integrations.
Database-backed communication between lead-sheet-team and the product app is intentionally deferred.
The Markdown contract will still need a later importer/exporter layer when Supabase becomes the system of record.
